subcodes.title: Words to H.E.H et al, spoken on 1913-11-01
subcodes.first_line: You must feel very happy because you are here with me and we are associating together with the utmost kindness.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسیار خوش آمدید ماندن ما در اینجا مانند عبادت است امید وارم که نتائج عظیمه حاصل نماید جمیع نفوس خوابند
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @many are called but few are chosen, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
